items.text: core: frontmatter 加 covers 字段(pages.ts KnowledgePage + asArray 解析,缺省 [])
core: graph.ts 派生 cover 边 + code 节点(每页每条 covers glob 产 from:页 to:glob type:cover)
core: 加 fast-glob(lint 展开用)+picomatch(--path 匹配用)依赖,写 query.ts(relatedDocs 双向去重+仅同scope+未知id抛错 / coverageForDoc 返声明 globs 不展开 / docsCoveringPath picomatch 单向匹配)
core: cache.ts —— graph.json{meta:{generatedAt,maxMtime,pageCount},nodes,edges} + readGraphCached 指纹校验/重建 + writeGraphCache;接进 rebuildKnowledgeIndexes(eager);graph 命令/web 改读 readGraphCached
core: lint.ts 加悬空 covers checker(glob 零命中报 issue,同断链级别)
core: 按项目规范显式具名导出新 API(knowledge/index.ts + core index.ts,禁 export *),值/类型分组
cli: knowledge.ts 加 related <id> 与 coverage(--doc/--path 二选一)两子命令,薄壳调 core,继承 --json
items.verify: pnpm --filter @withy/cli build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js knowledge related core --json && node packages/cli/dist/index.js knowledge coverage --doc core --json && node packages/cli/dist/index.js knowledge coverage --path packages/core/src/store/checklist.ts --json
node packages/cli/dist/index.js knowledge graph >/dev/null 2>&1; test -z "$(git status --porcelain .withy/knowledge/graph.json)"

items.text: app: KnowledgeGraph.tsx 换 react-force-graph-2d(dynamic ssr:false,nodeVal 按 inDegree,仅 link 边+文档节点,onNodeClick 打开文档,保留选中高亮)+ 加依赖
data: 给既有页加 covers(core->packages/core/src/**、cli->packages/cli/src/**、harness/node-gate-checkers/task-event-timeline/web/knowledge-base 映射各自代码),提供真实关联数据
items.verify: node packages/cli/dist/index.js knowledge coverage --doc core --json && node packages/cli/dist/index.js knowledge lint

items.text: docs: knowledge-base.md 记 covers/related/coverage/graph.json 缓存语义;cli.md/core.md 补命令面与 cover 边;重算 index
items.verify: node packages/cli/dist/index.js knowledge lint && node packages/cli/dist/index.js knowledge index

items.text: 全量校验:typecheck + lint(0 warning) + 三包 build
items.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm --filter @withy/core build && pnpm --filter @withy/cli build && pnpm --filter @withy/app build
